userErrors.message: Profile name must be less than 128 characters long
The Location could not be found for this shop.
Profile is invalid: cannot create LocationGroupZone without countries.

notes: Captured with SHOPIFY_CONFORMANCE_API_VERSION=2026-04 and home-folder conformance auth.

The public Admin GraphQL 2026-04 schema exposes deliveryProfileCreate.userErrors as UserError with field/message only; local runtime tests cover the HAR-566 code convenience field requested by the ticket.
Unknown-location and empty-country live field paths were null in the public schema response. Local runtime tests cover the ticket-required dotted field paths.

Live probes for duplicate country, province-overlap, and rest-of-world overlap inputs created disposable profiles instead of returning userErrors; those disposable profiles were removed with deliveryProfileRemove jobs. Local runtime tests still cover the ticket-required overlapping-zone guardrail.
